# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

## Web Subnet Configuration
Name: web
Address Prefixes: 10.200.0.0/16

## App Subnet Configuration
Name: app
Address Prefixes: 10.300.0.0/16

## Database Subnet Configuration
Name: db
Address Prefixes: 10.400.0.0/16

## Virtual Network
Address Ranges: 10.0.0.0/8 (Virtual Network) and 20.20.20.0/8 (Internet)

## Subnets

Name: web
Resource Group: AzureVnet-web-subnet-RG
Location: westus
Address Prefixes: 10.200.0.0/24
Network Security Groups: AzureVNet-Web-NSG-SNET

Name: app
Resource Group: AzureVnet-app-subnet-RG
Location: westus
Address Prefixes: 10.300.0.0/24
Network Security Groups: AzureVNet-App-NSG-SNET

Name: db
Resource Group: AzureVnet-db-subnet-RG
Location: westus
Address Prefixes: 10.400.0.0/24
Network Security Groups: AzureVNet-DB-NSG-SNET
